q:
List all 10 IPL 2026 franchises. For EACH team provide exactly these fields:
- Full name
- Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation
- Home city and primary home venue (stadium)
- 2026 captain
- Team primary colour (hex if possible)
- 2026 squad: 3-5 standout Indian players and 2-4 standout overseas players (names only)
- One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact
Return clean markdown, one section per franchise. Use 2026 rosters.
answer:
### Chennai Super Kings
**Full name**: Chennai Super Kings  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Chennai Super Kings (CSK)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Chennai, M.A. Chidambaram Stadium  
**2026 captain**: MS Dhoni[3]  
**Team primary colour**: Yellow (#FFDB1F)  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: MS Dhoni, Ruturaj Gaikwad, Shivam Dube, Sanju Samson, Mukesh Choudhary  
- Standout overseas players: Dewald Brevis, Noor Ahmad, Nathan Ellis, Jamie Overton[3]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: Five-time IPL champions known for their consistent playoff appearances and yellow brigade fandom.[1][5]

### Mumbai Indians
**Full name**: Mumbai Indians  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Mumbai Indians (MI)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Mumbai, Wankhede Stadium  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**Team primary colour**: Blue (#003087)  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: Shardul Thakur (traded in)  
- Standout overseas players: Not specified in available data[6]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: The most successful IPL franchise with five titles, owned by Reliance Industries.[1]

### Royal Challengers Bengaluru
**Full name**: Royal Challengers Bengaluru  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Bengaluru, M. Chinnaswamy Stadium  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**Team primary colour**: Red (#E10600)  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: Not specified in available data  
- Standout overseas players: Not specified in available data[1][2]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: Acquired in 2026 by Aditya Birla Group-led consortium for $1.78 billion, now the most valuable IPL franchise.[1]

### Kolkata Knight Riders
**Full name**: Kolkata Knight Riders  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Kolkata, Eden Gardens  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**Team primary colour**: Purple (#4F2C7F)  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: Not specified in available data  
- Standout overseas players: Not specified in available data[2][5]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: Three-time champions owned by the Shah Rukh Khan-led Red Chillies Entertainment group.[5]

### Delhi Capitals
**Full name**: Delhi Capitals  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Delhi Capitals (DC)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Delhi, Arun Jaitley Stadium  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**Team primary colour**: Navy Blue (#00539F)  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: Not specified in available data  
- Standout overseas players: Not specified in available data[2][3][5]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: Rebranded from Delhi Daredevils, co-owned by JSW Group and GMR Group.[5]

### Gujarat Titans
**Full name**: Gujarat Titans  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Gujarat Titans (GT)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Ahmedabad, Narendra Modi Stadium  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**2026 squad**:  
- Standout Indian players: Not specified in available data  
- Standout overseas players: Sherfane Rutherford[1][6]  
**One-line identity / notable franchise-history fact**: Instant success story since 2022 debut, with Torrent Group holding majority stake since 2025.[1]

**Full name**: Rajasthan Royals  
**Common short name and 3-letter abbreviation**: Rajasthan Royals (RR)  
**Home city and primary home venue**: Jaipur, Sawai Mansingh Stadium  
**2026 captain**: Not specified in available data  
**Team primary colour**: Pink (#E30B5D)  
**2026 squad**:
